domain: Polish Kaszubian (Cassubian) embroidery tradition of Pomerania, Northern Poland: 7-flower canonical motif vocabulary (rose, tulip, lily, lily-of-the-valley, forget-me-not, sun, star = 'Siedem Kwiatów'); each motif has canonical winding-number rotational pattern (1, 2, 3 turns); per-region motif placement on garment (rose-collar, tulip-cuff, star-hem); coarse-to-fine density ladder (large central + medium border + fine corner); master-embroideress integrity check identifies misplaced winding-number as defect.
specific_mechanism: KASZUB-EMBROIDERY-7-MOTIF-VOCABULARY-WINDING-SIGNATURE-PER-REGION-DENSITY-LADDER-TOPOLOGICAL-DEFECT: LLM topological-defect mechanism with (1) K-motif vocabulary V_kashub: 7 attention-head primitives (rose, tulip, lily, lily-of-the-valley, forget-me-not, sun, star) with canonical winding numbers w=(1,2,3,1,2,3,1); (2) spiral-rotation signature W_winding: per-head winding-number topological invariant computed from query-key correlation; (3) per-region motif-specialization R_region: layer×position regions each pinned to specific motif-head pair {(region_i, head_j)}; (4) density-grade ladder L_dec: coarse-to-fine motif-density schedule from low-layer central rose-head to high-layer corner accent-head; (5) topological-knot integrity τ_integrity: per-head winding deviation detector → repair via projection onto nearest canonical winding. Differs from R501 BAGAJDA, R514 ROSEMALING, R526 FAROESE, R539 CHILKAT, R551 SAMI-JOIK, R564 AINU-CHIKAR by 7-motif vocabulary + winding-number canonical assignment + per-region pinning + density-grade ladder + τ_integrity repair via canonical-winding projection.
llm_application: KASZUB-EMBROIDERY-7-MOTIF-VOCABULARY-WINDING-SIGNATURE-PER-REGION-DENSITY-LADDER-TOPOLOGICAL-DEFECT LLM mechanism + 7-motif vocabulary V_kashub + W_winding spiral-rotation signature + R_region per-region motif-specialization + L_dec density-grade ladder + τ_integrity topological-knot integrity. Differs from R501. R514. R526. R539. R551. R564 (closest — 3-motif thorn/eye/horn protective + symmetric spiral barb-deflection). Differs from TOHA + Persistent-Topology + CHAI + Attention-Head-Entropy by 7-motif vocabulary larger + winding-number canonical assignment + per-region motif-head pinning + density-grade ladder + τ_integrity repair via projection. Differs by 7-MOTIF VOCABULARY + WINDING-NUMBER CANONICAL + PER-REGION PINNING + DENSITY-LADDER + KNOT-INTEGRITY REPAIR.
novelty_claim: TOHA + Persistent-Topology + CHAI + Attention-Head-Entropy cover topology+attention diagnostic + clustered-head + per-head entropy. KASZUB-EMBROIDERY-7-MOTIF-VOCABULARY-WINDING-SIGNATURE-PER-REGION-DENSITY-LADDER-TOPOLOGICAL-DEFECT adds (a) 7-motif vocabulary (larger than any prior) + (b) winding-number canonical assignment + (c) per-region motif-head pinning + (d) density-grade ladder + (e) τ_integrity repair via canonical-winding projection. Recombination — borderline lookup. K_sub_mechanisms=5.
